Linces Softco Limited.description: My task was to created a professional website for a rising tech company focused in the customs sector. The goal was to make the website feel like like a luxury service while keeping it simple. So I based the design off of how Apple handles their simple black and whites.

The JT Group.description: I was tasked with designing a web-based dashboard that displays managerial level data, it needed to be able to filter based on a date range given or timeframe size. Being able to diaplay individual days of data over a week to mutiple weeks within a month.

Willowbank.description: This job was an oppertunity for real-world experience as part of the web-development module in university. The project was to create a user platform for a outdoor skills forest school meant for children in both primary and secondary school. My role was to build components to be used in the frontend. A high importance was placed on handling data in a way that was GDPR compliant.

Cherrytree.place: Cherry Tree Primary School and Nursery
Cherrytree.description:
This was an internship oppertunity presented in college where in groups we were tasked to create educational games for children in years 5-6 with special educational needs.

I took for role as the director and main programmer and created a complete game where you have to count how many fish pass by odd and funny types of submarine windows.
